action.content:
Write a short proposal for a new research project that investigates how language evolves over time. I want to make it challenging, so:
1. Do not include any commas in your response.
2. Do not include the letter "c" anywhere in your response.
3. Your response should contain at least 250 words.
action.label: context

action.content: A groundbreaking study will examine linguistic shifts across generations. We will track vocabulary changes in communities worldwide. This approach reveals how language adapts to new circumstances. Our team includes linguists, sociologists, and computer scientists. We use advanced computational methods to analyze vast datasets. Each participant contributes personal language usage patterns. These insights help predict future developments. The project builds on existing linguistic theories. We test them against real-world examples. Results will inform language policy decisions. This research has broad implications. It could benefit education systems. Understanding language evolution matters for communication. We aim to publish findings in top journals. Collaboration with international partners strengthens our work. Funding will support extensive data collection. The team remains committed to excellence. This proposal outlines our vision clearly. We believe this project will make significant contributions. Let us begin this important journey together.
action.label: response
